humor.style_hint: bright natural daylight, lively candid energy with real comedic timing in the performance, expressive but believable faces, everyday Korean office or street setting, slightly warm lens rendering
humor.atmosphere: lighthearted everyday comedy caught on camera

touching.style_hint: warm golden-hour window light with long soft shadows, gentle bokeh, intimate framing that catches micro-expressions, nostalgic but natural film texture, shallow depth of field isolating the subject
touching.atmosphere: intimate and tender, slow contemplative pacing

anger.style_hint: hard top light or harsh fluorescent with deep shadows, slightly desaturated background with a warm-red accent on the skin, tight close framing, visible jaw and hand tension, gritty natural texture
anger.atmosphere: tense and confrontational, pressure building in stillness

sadness.style_hint: overcast flat daylight or rain-streaked window light, desaturated cool tones, empty negative space around the subject, shallow focus blurring the background into emotional distance
sadness.atmosphere: melancholic and still, drawn-out quiet rhythm

horror.style_hint: single dim practical light source with deep black shadows, cold green-grey cast, claustrophobic doorway and hallway framing, underexposed detail at the edges of the frame, unsettling stillness
horror.atmosphere: dread-filled and oppressive, slow deliberate pacing

info.style_hint: clean even daylight in a tidy office or studio corner, sharp focus throughout, uncluttered background with calm negative space, neutral professional grading with a slight cool bias
info.atmosphere: professional and clear, measured steady pacing

controversy.style_hint: low-key split lighting on the face, a desk with scattered documents and a glowing phone screen, news-interview framing, high contrast but natural rendering, evidence-like props in frame
controversy.atmosphere: confrontational and investigative, quiet building tension

daily.style_hint: natural window daylight in a lived-in Korean home or cafe, casual vlog-like realism, everyday objects in frame adding authenticity, soft natural shadows, comfortable depth of field
daily.atmosphere: relaxed and authentic, natural conversational pacing

shock.style_hint: stark direct light with high contrast, the instant just after something happens — wide eyes, stopped hands, a dropped object mid-frame, crisp detail on the frozen reaction
shock.atmosphere: frozen-moment surprise, a held breath before the reaction
